name: Telmisartan And Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP
about: Telmisartan And Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP is a solid dosage form of general medicine from India. It is available in tablet form and should be stored in a dry place. The dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the suggestion of the physician. Telmisartan And Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP is an effective medicine for treating hypertension and reducing the risk of heart attack and stroke. The combination of Telmisartan and Hydrochlorothiazide works by relaxing blood vessels and removing excess salt and water from the body. It is a highly recommended medicine for patients with high blood pressure.
